name: Property Onboarding
description: Leasing, Maintenance, and human gates collect property readiness facts, score onboarding readiness, and record activation without AppFolio writes.

stages.name: Collect Property Facts
stages.description: Collect property, unit, access, utility, insurance, inspection, photo, and open-maintenance inputs.

steps.title: Collect property and unit facts
steps.instructions: Collect property address, owner link, management start date, unit mix, occupancy, rent-ready assumptions, leasing constraints, and missing data. Label unknowns explicitly.
steps.dispatch_body: Collect property, owner, unit, occupancy, and leasing readiness facts.

steps.title: Collect access, utilities, and insurance facts
steps.instructions: Collect keys, lockbox, gate, alarm, utility responsibility, provider transfer status, insurance evidence, and owner-provided operating notes.
steps.dispatch_title: Collect property access and insurance facts
steps.dispatch_body: Collect keys, utilities, insurance, and owner operating notes.

steps.title: Collect maintenance readiness inputs
steps.instructions: Collect inspection status, safety issues, habitability risks, required photos, open maintenance, vendor blockers, and urgent make-ready needs.
steps.dispatch_body: Collect inspection, photo, maintenance, and safety readiness inputs for property onboarding.

stages.name: Score Readiness
stages.description: Build readiness scoring with explicit blockers and a human readiness gate.

steps.title: Build property onboarding readiness score
steps.instructions: Build a 0-100 readiness score with blockers, warnings, missing facts, leasing readiness, maintenance readiness, and owner-visible caveats. Do not hide unknown data.
steps.dispatch_body: Build readiness score from property, leasing, access, insurance, inspection, photo, and maintenance inputs.

steps.title: Review property onboarding readiness
steps.instructions: Review readiness score, blockers, AppFolio checklist assumptions, and whether the property can proceed to activation. No AppFolio writes are allowed.
steps.human_prompt: Review property onboarding readiness before activation or AppFolio entry preparation. No AppFolio writes are allowed.

stages.name: Prepare AppFolio Entry Checklist
stages.description: Prepare a checklist-only AppFolio entry packet with no live AppFolio writes.

steps.title: Prepare AppFolio entry checklist
steps.instructions: Prepare checklist-only AppFolio entry fields for property, units, owner link, rent settings, access notes, utilities, insurance, photos, inspection, and maintenance caveats. No AppFolio writes, API calls, imports, or live updates are allowed.
steps.dispatch_title: Prepare checklist-only AppFolio property entry packet
steps.dispatch_body: Prepare AppFolio entry checklist only; do not write to AppFolio.

steps.title: Review AppFolio entry checklist
steps.instructions: Review checklist completeness and confirm no live AppFolio entry has been performed by this workflow.
steps.human_prompt: Review AppFolio entry checklist. This workflow must not write to AppFolio.

stages.name: Activate And Record Outcome
stages.description: Approve activation, record onboarding outcome, and hand off only system state.

steps.title: Approve property onboarding activation
steps.instructions: Approve activation, hold for blockers, or request edits. Confirm AppFolio entry remains outside this workflow. No AppFolio writes are allowed.
steps.human_prompt: Approve property onboarding activation or hold for blockers.

steps.title: Record property onboarding outcome
steps.instructions: Record activation outcome, readiness score, approved caveats, remaining blockers, checklist location, and owner-facing summary notes.
steps.dispatch_body: Record property onboarding activation outcome and caveats.

steps.title: Publish property onboarding handoff
steps.instructions: Publish internal workflow handoff state for downstream leasing, maintenance, and owner projection consumers. No AppFolio writes are allowed.
steps.dispatch_body: Publish internal property onboarding handoff state for downstream workflows.
